practice.name: Problem 2 (2017 AMC 8)
practice.statement: Alicia, Brenda, and Colby were the candidates in a recent election for student president. The pie chart below shows how the votes were distributed among the three candidates. If Brenda received $36$ votes, then how many votes were cast all together? [See picture in original link]

practice.name: Problem 6 (2016 AMC 8)
practice.statement: The following bar graph represents the length (in letters) of the names of 19 people. What is the median length of these names?

practice.name: Problem 14 (2020 AMC 8)
practice.statement: There are $20$ cities in the County of Newton. Their populations are shown in the bar chart below. The average population of all the cities is indicated by the horizontal dashed line. Which of the following is closest to the total population of all $20$ cities?

practice.name: Problem 7 (2002 AMC 8)
practice.statement: The students in Mrs. Sawyer's class were asked to do a taste test of five kinds of candy. Each student chose one kind of candy. A bar graph of their preferences is shown. What percent of her class chose candy E?
